projectDescription: An open-source agentic CLI framework that turns natural-language game-design prompts into fully playable web games end-to-end.
keyFeatures: Prompt-to-playable-game: describe a game in plain language and OpenGame builds it end-to-end
Game Skill: Template Skill scaffolds stable project architectures; Debug Skill systematically fixes runtime errors
GameCoder-27B: a code LLM fine-tuned for game engine APIs, scaffolding, and bug-fix workflows
OpenGame-Bench: evaluation pipeline scoring Build Health, Visual Usability, and Intent Alignment via headless browser
Headless / scriptable mode: run opengame -p '...' for CI, batch generation, and benchmark runs
Multi-modal asset generation: independent providers for image, video, audio, and reasoning modalities
MCP integration: connect to external tools and data sources via Model Context Protocol
Agent Skills: extensible, modular capabilities that can be shared via git
Subagents: specialized AI assistants that handle focused tasks with controlled tool access
Approval modes: Plan, Default, Auto-Edit, and YOLO for fine-grained permission control
publicApiSurface: opengame (CLI binary) — interactive and headless game generation
opengame mcp add/list/remove — MCP server management
QueryOptions: cwd, model, permissionMode, canUseTool, mcpServers, abortController
tool(name, description, inputSchema, handler) — SDK MCP tool factory
OPENAI_API_KEY / OPENAI_BASE_URL / OPENAI_MODEL — main agent LLM configuration
